final:
module top_module(
   input wire  clk,
   input wire  reset,

   input wire  din,
   output wire flag
   );assign flag = din;
  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        flag <= 1'b0;
      end else if (!clk) begin
        flag <= 1'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
